zh.lifeSummary: 當Wolfric de Hatton於大約1038年出生在英國爾哈頓時，他的父親Wolfric de Hatton27歲，母親Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia22歲。他於1062年與Emma de Daresbury在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1100年在英國爾盧可享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wolfric de Hatton于大约1038年出生在英国爾哈頓时，他的父亲Wolfric de Hatton27岁，母亲Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia22岁。他于1062年与Emma de Daresbury在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1100年在英国爾盧可享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

variants.name: Hatten
meanings: English: variant of   Hatton  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
North German: habitational name from the name of an area of marshland between Oldenburg and Bremen.

variants.name: Hattan
meanings: English and Scottish (Argyll): variant of   Hatton  .

variants.name: Aton
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Heath
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(on the) heath’ (Middle English he(a)th, Old English hǣth) or else a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. The same word also denoted heather, the characteristic plant of heathland areas. This surname has also been established in Dublin, Ireland, since the late 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Wolfric de Hatton was born about 1038, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, his father, Wolfric de Hatton, was 27 and his mother, Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, was 22. He married Emma de Daresbury in 1062, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died about 1100, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wolfric de Hatton est né environ 1038, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Wolfric de Hatton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma de Daresbury en 1062, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé environ 1100, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wolfric de Hatton um 1038 in Hatton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wolfric de Hatton 27 und seine Mutter Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia 22. Er hat 1062 in Cheshire, England Emma de Daresbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb um 1100 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Runcorn, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wolfric de Hatton è nato il circa 1038 nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Wolfric de Hatton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma de Daresbury nel 1062, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì circa 1100, nel Runcorn, Cheshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wolfric de Hattonが約1038年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Wolfric de Hattonは27歳，母Ealdgyth Swansneck of Merciaは22歳であった。1062年にイギリスチェシュアイアでEmma de Daresburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は約1100年にイギリスチェシュアイアルンコルンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wolfric de Hatton(이)가 대략 1038년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wolfric de Hatton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1062년 영국 체실르에서 Emma de Daresbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1100년 영국 체실르 런코른에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1038–about 1100: tany ho any amin'ny 1038–tany ho any amin'ny 1100

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wolfric de Hatton nasceu aproximadamente 1038, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Wolfric de Hatton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Daresbury em 1062, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wolfric de Hatton родился около 1038 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Wolfric de Hatton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Daresbury в 1062 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер около 1100 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

sm.about 1038–about 1100: e tusa o le 1038–e tusa o le 1100

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wolfric de Hatton nació aproximadamente 1038, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Wolfric de Hatton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ealdgyth Swansneck of Mercia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Emma de Daresbury en 1062, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en Runcorn, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
